strengths: 20 years of engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and embedded systems—exceeds the 15-year minimum with demonstrated multi-domain depth
Current Staff role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing hands-on engagement with emerging AI technologies
Established technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, open-source projects, and founding GISCollective—demonstrates ability to inspire and guide engineers
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML—lacks the preferred advanced qualification, particularly critical for a specialized AI strategy role
AI involvement appears infrastructure and tooling-focused rather than strategic product development—no evidence of building or leading AI-powered products or platforms
Career history shows implementation and architecture roles; limited evidence of director-level strategic advisory experience or recognized external thought leadership on AI/cloud strategy

key_factors.factor: AI strategic expertise and product experience

response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the minimum 15-year requirement with 20 years of technical experience and his current role touches AI infrastructure—a promising signal. However, this role demands specialized strategic expertise in AI platforms and demonstrated thought leadership. His experience remains implementation-focused; his current AI work is infrastructure and tooling rather than platform or product strategy; and he lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in AI. While technically capable with emerging AI exposure, he does not yet demonstrate the strategic depth and external recognition this director-level specialized role requires.
